title: 『1度殻をむいた卵は食すのみ』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Camp is halfway over, and I'm currently taking
Sakura Chiyono O's times, like I promised I would
before summer camp started.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... What's... what was my time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look at the notes on my clipboard and compare
her newest time to the past times I've recorded
for her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Did I get a new PR?! Am I even faster than I was in
the spring?!
choice_data_list:
It's about the same as it was toward the end of
last year.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... It's harder to improve than I thought it
would be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creak... Crack...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It's that feeling again...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It feels like I'm getting weaker. Like I'm starting to
splinter apart... I feel as if I'll never be able to
return to how I was before...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...I'm scared.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: If I were to race against Maruzen as I am now...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen would probably be running at the front
all by herself, while I'd be watching her from the
pack.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No one would be able to reach her. But as she
rounded the third turn, I'd charge forward!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'd gradually ramp up to my top speed, and the
distance between me and Maruzen would slowly
decrease.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Then we'd hit the final stretch—and it'd be down
to raw speed! I'd squeeze out every drop of
strength in me and pull forward to chase after
Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen would glance back at me! She'd
challenge me to a one-on-one duel! And I'd push
forward as hard as I could!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And the moment I go to take my next stride... my
legs would give out under me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creak... Crack!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No matter how much strength I try to muster up,
my weak, fading body won't be able to hold on to
it... One by one, the other racers will pass me...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...And I won't reach her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... There's no way I can be her rival, not like I
am right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O and I are just about to start
training, but she has an unusually dark expression
on her face.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! It's nothing that will affect training
today, so don't worry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Is that... a crowd?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O! Did you come to observe the match
too?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ardan and Bamboo are racing against each other!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That was something else... How did you manage
to recover so fast?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Ardan won. Bamboo's at her very peak, but
Ardan still managed to defeat her, even though
she's only just recovered...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Uh, congratulations, Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much. I'm glad to be back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That feeling of regret you showed me... that
passionate desire not to lose... it spurred me on
and led me to this point.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That is quite a feat, Ardan. However, as I
am sure you know, Chiyono O will not be
defeated so easily.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Having raced against her, I am well aware of her
strength. And as such, I will not lose at the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I didn't realize you'd be running in it! Will you
be there as well, Chiyono?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Um... Yes, I will.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Then if I enter the autumn Tenno Sho as well, it
will be just like the Derby. The three of us can
race each other once more!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(I should recognize that feeling. I felt the same
way myself after the Derby.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
When I finally crossed the finish line, I found
myself wishing the race could've gone on longer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to fight for the lead with Yaeno and
Ardan forever. I wanted to keep running until the
stars burn out.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... It's finally... over!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
As my body holds me back... it feels like it's even
tearing those feelings out of my grasp...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Chiyono O?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Ardan is exactly the same as she was before she
took her break.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...I hate this.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: (Yaeno isn't declining either. I'm not like them.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I hate this... I hate this.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(I'm not the Sakura Chiyono O who ran in the
Derby anymore...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I hate this so much!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O?!

Everyone, please give me a second. Let me talk
to her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Why? Why can't I—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Puff...

Phew, I finally caught up to you! You just kept on
charging off, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maruzen? Why are you here?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Because I've been watching you, of
course! I've always got my eye on you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, you really confused everyone back
there, suddenly running off in the middle of
talking to your friends like that. Chiyo...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...You wouldn't happen to be past your peak,
would you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! How do you know that?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... It's just a feeling, I guess. Since I've been
through it too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You're lying. There's no way you understand how I
feel. You're always—

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky! Is it true that you won your first
scrimmage in a long time by seven lengths?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I saw you race. You came back from your break as
if it was no big deal at all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You're incredible... You've never once had to
worry about whether you were in your peak or
not.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I knew you were special. You're not like me.
You've got extraordinary talen—

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: That's not quite right, hon.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Do you feel like you're slowly losing yourself?
Like you'll never be able to return to how you
were before?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I hit the nail right on the head, didn't I?
That's exactly how I felt, you see. I also tried to
return to how I was back in my heyday.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I simply couldn't. My body will never be able
to go back to the condition it was in, and I can't
run like I did before.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I feel pretty good! That wasn't so bad. In fact...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Even if I'm past my peak, I'm going to keep
running as I am.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There's a fire burning inside of me, fueled by the
desire not to lose to my rival—and that's you,
Chiyo.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Having a rival sure is something. I never
would have imagined I'd hate the thought of
losing so much!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Once a glass is broken, it can't go back to how it
was. I knew there was no hope of restoring it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I knew what was happening, but that didn't mean
I had to take it lying down! So I kept fighting and
fighting until I felt like myself again.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I may not be the same "me" that I was before, but
I can say with pride that I'm no lesser racer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now, dear Chiyo. Isn't your heart ablaze at the
sight of me, your rival, standing in front of you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maruzen...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who stirred that emotion to life in
me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And I've proved that you can overcome what
you're feeling now, so long as that feeling is alive
and well in you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Now then, Chiyo.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: There's a 2,400-meter turf race in Tokyo waiting for you... I'll be waiting for you. At the Japan Cup—our Derby.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'll see you there, my precious rival!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You're dripping with sweat. Did you sprint all the
way here?
choice_data_list: Never mind me. Are you okay?
Never mind me. Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ah! I'm sorry for worrying you. But...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm not going to run from the truth anymore.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll likely never return to being the racer I was
before.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No... it's fine. I've decided to face reality
head-on.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You don't have anything to worry about, Chiyo. I
have no doubt you'll be able to overcome this.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I may be gradually declining...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But there are still things I must do. I'll find a new
way to fight my battles. I have to!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Because I don't want to lose to my rivals!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The flickering light of the setting sun burns in
Sakura Chiyono O's eyes, bright with hope and
acceptance.
